title: Russian attack cuts power to around 150,000 in Ukraine’s north as Kyiv hits missile, oil facilities
summary_full: The update comes as Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy welcomed strikes on a key missile components facility in the Russian city of Kirov.
summary_public: The update comes as Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy welcomed strikes on a key missile components facility in the Russian city of Kirov.
